about.text: Fullstack developer obsessed with distributed architectures and interfaces that punch. I enjoy optimizing a SQL query as much as polishing a CSS animation. Currently shipping production systems and sharpening the edges.

projects.title: NEXUS API
projects.description: Real-time API orchestration platform. Event-driven architecture with intelligent rate limiting and built-in monitoring dashboard.

projects.title: VOID RUNNER
projects.description: WASM-powered terminal emulator running in the browser. Sub-millisecond input latency and a custom rendering pipeline on Canvas 2D.

projects.title: PULSE GRID
projects.description: Distributed metrics aggregation engine deployed across 12 regions. Handles 2M events/sec with sub-second query latency.

projects.title: GHOST SHELL
projects.description: Async terminal UI framework for ops tooling. Zero-dependency, composable widgets, theme engine with live reload.
